name: Old-Fashioned Strawberry Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour a pint of whipping cream into a tall, narrow mixing bowl.
2. Add the electric mixer beaters to the bowl and place it in the freezer to chill.
3. Prepare biscuits using the biscuit mix and following the instructions on the box.
4. While the biscuits are baking, wash, hull, and slice a quart of strawberries.
5. Add 2 tablespoons (or more) of sugar to the sliced strawberries and mash them slightly to release the juice.
6. Remove the whipped cream from the freezer and beat it with an electric mixer until desired consistency is reached.
7. Once the biscuits have cooled slightly, split them open and fill each half with a portion of mashed strawberries and whipping cream.
8. Top each shortcake with fresh berries.
